cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out how many penguins are more than 5 years old and weigh more than 12 kg. The data is given in a table, so I should probably go through each penguin one by one and check their age and weight. First, let me list out all the penguins with their details. The header is name, age, height (cm), weight (kg). Then the penguins are: 1. Louis, 7, 50, 11 2. Bernard, 5, 80, 13 3. Vincent, 9, 60, 11 4. Gwen, 8, 70, 15 So, for each penguin, I need to check two conditions: age > 5 and weight > 12 kg. Starting with Louis. His age is 7, which is more than 5. But his weight is 11 kg, which is not more than 12. So Louis doesn't qualify. Next is Bernard. His age is 5. Wait, the condition is more than 5 years old. So 5 is not more than 5.
